use_cases: Displaying user testimonials with profile avatars in social proof sections
Building trust through customer review cards on landing pages
Showing user-generated content with visual identity elements
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based avatar component designed for testimonial display contexts. Built with Tailwind CSS for clean, accessible user profile presentation. The component supports image loading with fallback initials for graceful degradation. Intended for social proof and testimonial sections where visual user identity enhances credibility.
